attacking_style: Functions as advance relay rider rather than independent attacker, positioning ahead on climbs to support protected leader's long-range moves (50km+ from finish).
team_tactics: Classic domestique role: establishes position ahead of protected rider's attack to provide relay support. Coordinates with multiple teammates (Soler, Quintana Dayer) in synchronized mountain support.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages where relay work is critical; comfortable operating far from finish on sustained climbs where GC attacks develop.
vulnerability: Limited observations suggest pure support role; unlikely competitive threat when isolated or in reduced sprint/positioning scenarios without protected leader.
key_patterns: Positioned ahead as relay rider before Quintana's long-range attacks, 50km+ out (2 races)
Coordinated sibling/family team support structure with Quintana brothers across multiple years (2 races)
Functions in classic mountain domestique capacity, leading out rather than finishing attacks (2 races)
form_trajectory: unknown: too few observations and purely support role makes individual form assessment impossible from available data
